title: The War at Marineford Begins

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah... this is a secret, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What the heck was that Explo- Sion!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
